headline: Jordan Reid to McAfee: Ty Simpson a 'huge risk' for the Jets
description: NFL draft analyst Jordan Reid joins Pat McAfee to break down Ty Simpson's chances of being selected by the Jets.

headline: Should the Jets draft Ty Simpson at No. 16?
description: The "Get Up" crew weighs in on Ty Simpson's private workout with the Jets and how high they should draft him.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Latest buzz on Ty Simpson, Jeremiyah Love
description: How high could QB Ty Simpson get picked? Is Jeremiyah Love really a possibility for the Titans at No. 4? Our draft experts weigh in with new intel.

headline: 2026 NFL draft: Tannenbaum's prospect targets in Rounds 1-7
description: From Dillon Thieneman on Day 1 to Jaffer Murphy late on Day 3, Mike Tannenbaum picks the draft prospects he'd want to target across all seven rounds.

headline: How Ravens' strong 2022 draft class cashed in for $300 million
description: Of the 11 players drafted by Baltimore in 2022, only two remain, but there's a pride to their development.

headline: Bills 2026 offseason: What's next for Buffalo's roster?
description: With the height of free agency over and ahead of April's draft, let's see where Joe Brady & Co. can still add.

headline: Will the Jets take a chance on drafting Ty Simpson?
description: Adam Schefter joins "Get Up" and weighs in on whether the Jets will take a chance on drafting Ty Simpson.

headline: Trust the process: 25 trends to know before your fantasy football draft
description: Mike Clay shares his favorite notes from the research that informed his fantasy projections for 2026.

headline: 2026 NFL draft team needs: Depth chart holes, prospect fits
description: Our NFL reporters listed the top three positional needs for all 32 teams ahead of April's draft, and our draft experts found non-Round 1 fits to fill them.

headline: Carnell Tate doesn't run 'overvalued' 40 at Ohio State pro day
description: Receiver Carnell Tate elected Wednesday not to improve on his 40-yard dash time from the NFL combine, saying during Ohio State's pro day that it can be "overvalued."

headline: NFL draft: Ranking Ohio State first-round WRs since 2022
description: Tate could be the WR1 of the 2026 draft. But how does he compare to Garrett Wilson, Chris Olave, Jaxon Smith-Njigba, Marvin Harrison Jr. and Emeka Egbuka?
